title: sida spicata
intro: Sida spicata, also known as prickly sida or spiky sida, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida spicata include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Sida spicata is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
